rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and has no relation to Educ. Code §37.142, which governs conflicts of law for school offenses committed by children.
quote: To the extent of any conflict, this subchapter controls over any other law applied to a school offense alleged to have been committed by a child.
_note: No conflict; the two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters.
